title: ficus vermifuga
intro: Ficus vermifuga, also known as the Indian rubber tree or Indian banyan, is a plant native to parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to expel tapeworms and other parasites from the body. The health benefits of Ficus vermifuga include its potential to treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce swelling and pain. Ficus vermifuga is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to create various remedies.
